SEARCH
Package de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.object_model

Interface ISymbolicAssociationValueContainer

All Superinterfaces:
ISymbolicElement
All Known Subinterfaces:
ISymbolicObject, ISymbolicState
All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractSymbolicAssociationValueContainer, SymbolicLayoutReader.AbstractKeYlessAssociationValueContainer, SymbolicLayoutReader.KeYlessObject, SymbolicLayoutReader.KeYlessState, SymbolicObject, SymbolicState
public interface ISymbolicAssociationValueContainer extends ISymbolicElement

This interface is not instantiated directly because it defines only the common behavior of ISymbolicState and ISymbolicObject which is to contain associations (references to other ISymbolicObjects) and values (local variables of simple types).

The default abstract implementation is AbstractSymbolicAssociationValueContainer.

See Also:
  • AbstractSymbolicAssociationValueContainer
  • ISymbolicObject
  • ISymbolicState

  • Method Details

    • getAssociations

      ImmutableList<ISymbolicAssociation> getAssociations()
      Returns the contained associations.
      Returns:
      The contained associations.

    • getAssociation

      ISymbolicAssociation getAssociation(IProgramVariable programVariable, boolean isArrayIndex, JTerm arrayIndex, JTerm condition)
      Returns the ISymbolicAssociation with the given IProgramVariable.
      Parameters:
      programVariable - The IProgramVariable for which the ISymbolicAssociation is requested.
      isArrayIndex - Is array index?
      arrayIndex - The array index.
      condition - The optional condition under which this association is valid.
      Returns:
      The found ISymbolicAssociation or null if no ISymbolicAssociation is available with the given IProgramVariable.

    • getValues

      ImmutableList<ISymbolicValue> getValues()
      Returns the contained values.
      Returns:
      The contained values.

    • getValue

      ISymbolicValue getValue(IProgramVariable programVariable, boolean isArrayIndex, JTerm arrayIndex, JTerm condition)
      Returns the ISymbolicValue with the given IProgramVariable.
      Parameters:
      programVariable - The IProgramVariable for which the ISymbolicValue is requested.
      isArrayIndex - Is array index?
      arrayIndex - The array index.
      condition - The optional condition under which this value is valid.
      Returns:
      The found ISymbolicValue or null if no ISymbolicValue is available with the given IProgramVariable.
